features.name: Dependency graph
features.description: D3 force-directed graph with file nodes, import/call edges, directory cluster hulls, minimap, and cycle detection. The foundation everything else builds on.

features.name: TypeScript/JS parser
features.description: Regex-based parser with tsconfig alias resolution (@/ paths). Extracts import edges and symbol definitions. Fixed outgoing-only edge deletion bug on rescan.

features.name: Claude Haiku summarization
features.description: Batch file summarization using Claude Haiku. Hash-based cache skips unchanged files. Fixed re-summarization bug by preserving description+tags before deleteNodesForFile wipes them.

features.name: OpenAI semantic search
features.description: text-embedding-3-small embeddings power the /search endpoint. Falls back to keyword search when no OpenAI key is configured.

features.name: MCP HTTP server
features.description: Express server with 12 HTTP endpoints: /preflight, /search, /dependencies, /xref, /graph, /history, /status, /events (SSE), /config, /describe, /task, /debug. Rate limiting + CORS included.

features.name: Preflight endpoint
features.description: GET /preflight?task= scores every file for relevance to a natural-language task. Returns ranked file list with reasons and estimated token savings. Core value prop: 4-6 files instead of 40.

features.name: File watcher + live graph updates
features.description: chokidar watcher triggers rescan on every file save. SSE /events endpoint pushes graph-updated to the UI so the graph refreshes without manual reload.

features.name: Agent bootstrap (CLAUDE.md + .mcp.json)
features.description: mycelium init writes CLAUDE.md and .mcp.json so Claude Code auto-discovers the MCP server and calls /preflight before touching files. Zero manual setup for agents.

features.name: Graph viewer UI
features.description: Full D3 graph viewer in ui/index.html. Tabbed sidebar (Graph/History/Help), edge toggles, file/symbol zoom levels, directory cluster hulls, minimap, search, legend, settings modal.

features.name: Flow dot animation + color presets
features.description: Animated dots flow along edges when a node is selected. Lime = import source flowing in, pink = imported-by flowing out. 5 colorblind presets + custom color pickers, saved to localStorage.

features.name: Advanced graph interactions
features.description: Multi-select (shift+click), node pinning with localStorage persistence, subtree isolation, BFS neighbor expand with cascade ripple animation, inline description editing, copy-as-markdown, tag filtering.

features.name: Import cycle detection
features.description: DFS-based cycle detection runs on every graph load. Cycles show as red edges in graph and are listed in the sidebar. Click a cycle to focus its root node.

features.name: Settings modal
features.description: Two-tab modal: Scan Filters (ignore list management, default pattern toggle/allow) and Appearance (flow dot color presets + custom pickers). All settings saved to localStorage.

features.name: Session management architecture
features.description: SessionManager class: snapshot-on-start, diff-on-complete model. Uses git diff HEAD for accurate session summaries instead of stored descriptions. Files written — needs integration into build.
features.notes: sessions.ts is written. Server routes + cli 'mycelium task' command are written but not yet built and installed.

features.name: History tab UI
features.description: Collapsible session cards with per-file line deltas (+/-), active session live banner, AI summarize button with loading states, dismissable API key notice. Handles both new session format and legacy flat list.

features.name: Myc mascot
features.description: Animated SVG mushroom injected into graph viewer. Idle bob, walks between UI buttons, contextual tip bubbles, drag with corner snap, contextual item carries (🔍📦🔄☕), double-click spin, localStorage hide/show toggle.

features.name: Session system integration
features.description: Drop sessions.ts into src/, merge session route handlers into server.ts, merge 'mycelium task' subcommands into cli.ts. Then npm run build + npm install -g . to pick up changes.
features.notes: Files are all written. Just needs: copy sessions.ts → src/, merge server additions, merge cli additions, build + install, then test 'mycelium task X' in compound-hub.

features.name: CBM call edges on pakky
features.description: Call edges return 0 on pakky (React Native/Expo). Need to run mycelium debug in pakky to confirm alias resolution and CBM detection paths. compound-hub import edges also need post-fix verification.
features.notes: Run: cd compound-hub && mycelium debug — check that import edges are present post-fix.

features.name: Landing page Myc integration
features.description: Embed Myc on getmycelium.net: nav logo, browser favicon, animated hero character, scroll-triggered toast reactions at section boundaries, walking mode activates at 82% scroll depth.
features.notes: Behaviors designed. Pending: hook into landing page scroll events + Vercel deploy.

features.name: Roadmap feature (this file)
features.description: Feature→feature dependency graph stored in .mycelium/roadmap.json. GET /roadmap returns features + agent-ready context string. Roadmap tab in graph viewer with click-to-highlight-files.
features.notes: You are here. roadmap.json ✓ — server endpoints and UI tab pending.

features.name: POST /describe persistence
features.description: Server-side endpoint to persist inline description edits made in the graph viewer. Currently edits save to in-memory graph only — lost on server restart.

features.name: Publish updated npm package
features.description: Publish @kopikocappu/mycelium with session integration, roadmap feature, /describe endpoint, and all bug fixes since last publish.

features.name: Deploy landing page to Vercel
features.description: Deploy getmycelium.net to Vercel with Myc integration and full landing page polish.

features.name: Tree-sitter universal parser
features.description: Replace regex parser with tree-sitter for Python, Go, Rust, Java support. Enables multi-language codebases. Architecture designed, node-tree-sitter bindings tested.

features.name: Git integration
features.description: Read current branch, files changed vs main, last commit hash. Overlay git changes on the dependency graph. Connect sessions to git history for richer session context.

features.name: Formal benchmarks
features.description: Controlled benchmarks on compound-hub: files read with vs without Mycelium, token reduction percentage, task completion time. Document methodology for arXiv.

features.name: Technical blog post
features.description: Write the technical post explaining Mycelium's architecture, benchmark results, and design decisions. Target: HN front page, Anthropic developer blog.

features.name: Anthropic outreach
features.description: Reach out with benchmark results, blog post, and product demo. Target: Claude Corps fellowship or developer relations team. Portfolio piece for Anthropic application.

features.name: arXiv paper submission
features.description: Short paper on codebase intelligence for AI coding agents. Benchmark methodology, results, comparison to naive agent approaches.

features.name: Session replay UI
features.description: Click through a completed session's file changes as a graph animation. Each file lights up in order of modification, with line delta shown as node size pulse.

features.name: Preflight accuracy tracking
features.description: Compare /preflight predicted files against files actually modified per session. Track accuracy score over time. Feedback loop to improve scoring.

features.name: ○ Cloud backend
features.description: Supabase + Clerk + Next.js dashboard for team graph sharing, cross-session history, and preflight accuracy analytics across teammates.
features.notes: $12/mo Pro, $49/mo Team tiers. Self-hosted graph + cloud session history.

features.name: Stripe billing
features.description: Stripe integration for Pro ($12/mo) and Team ($49/mo) tiers on the cloud backend.
